creator: johan@stromnet.se
text:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/databases/hbase/Makefile?r1=399496&r2=401951&pathrev=413174

In the above change, JAVA_VERSION was changed from 1.7+ to 1.7. The patch before that added 1.8-compat fixes, and http://hbase.apache.org/book.html#java says 1.8 should work.

Was this change intentional?
